name: ASRock B760 PRO RS ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7200(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - eDP - Dragon 2.5G LAN

description: ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and M.2 Wi-Fi slot.
